heading: Disposition of conveyances seized for violation of the Indian liquor laws
label: 3670 Disposition of conveyances seized for violation of the Indian liquor laws
text: The provisions of shall apply to any conveyances seized, proceeded against by libel, or forfeited under the provisions of section 3113 or 3669 of this title for having been used in introducing or attempting to introduce intoxicants into the Indian country or into other places where such introduction is prohibited by treaty or enactment of Congress.section 3668 of this title
notes: Amendments1984— renumbered as this section and substituted “3668” for “3617” and “3669” for “3618”.Pub. L. 98–473section 3619 of this title

Effective Date of 1984 AmendmentAmendment by effective , and applicable only to offenses committed after the taking effect of such amendment, see , set out as an Effective Date note under .section 223(k) of Pub. L. 98–473section 235(a)(1) of Pub. L. 98–473section 3551 of this titleNov. 1, 1987
